testcase.name: test_cash_register_close_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Should require authentication assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cash_register_summary.py:130: in test_cash_register_close_requires_auth assert response.status_code == 401, "Should require authentication" E AssertionError: Should require authentication E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Should require authentication assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
